title: タマモ先輩の学園案内

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... I just arrived here from out of town
today...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd take a little walk before orientation starts, but... Hic!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
HEY! Whatcha doin', makin' dat poor girl cry?!
Explain yaself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intimidated by Tamamo's accusing glare, I
desperately try to defend myself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So that's how it was, eh? My bad for jumpin' to
conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, newbie. I came all the way out here from
Osaka myself, so I totally get how dauntin' it must
be for ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll take ya to the orientation! I'll even show
ya where the real important stuff happens 'round
campus along the way!
choice_data_list: Oh? Are you talking about the library?
Oh? Are you talking about the gym?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, ya gotta know where the library is to study!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here we are. Now listen, ya gotta be quiet in the
library—got it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your help. I can't believe I'm already
getting help from an underclassman.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're only here for a campus tour, but you're so
on top of things. I need to be more like you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The hell you callin' an underclassman?! Can't ya see that I'm wearing the academy uniform?! You're my junior!

text_block_list.name: Student Librarian
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross! This is a library! Please be quiet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's gonna be usin' it a lot soon!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And we're here. When it comes to equipment, if
ya can name it, it's here. Make sure ya train up
your energy and guts!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I'll make sure to set a good example
as your senior!
